summary: Smart Budget Optimizer V1 feature testing complete: All 15 backend tests passed (100%), frontend components verified (BudgetOptimizerCard in Results tab, OptimizationDashboardWidget on Dashboard)

console_warnings: Mixed Content warning for /api/notifications/ using HTTP instead of HTTPS - not related to Budget Optimizer feature

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/optimization/recommend/{test_id} requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/optimization/recommend returns 404 for non-existent test
Backend: POST /api/optimization/recommend returns valid recommendations structure
Backend: Recommendations summary has test_id, total_variations, to_scale, to_pause, to_maintain, waiting_data, overall_status
Backend: Each recommendation has variation_id, label, action, confidence, current_budget, recommended_budget, reasoning, metrics
Backend: Valid actions: increase_budget, maintain, pause, kill, needs_more_data
Backend: Confidence values are 0-1 range
Backend: Metrics include spend, clicks, ctr, cpc, purchases
Backend: Recommend accepts target_cpa parameter
Backend: Benchmarks include ctr_excellent, ctr_good, ctr_poor, cpc_good, cpc_poor, atc_good, atc_poor
Backend: GET /api/optimization/timeline/{test_id} requires authentication
Backend: Timeline returns events array with total count
Backend: Timeline events have id, test_id, variation_id, timestamp, metrics_snapshot, recommendation_action, recommended_budget, confidence
Backend: GET /api/optimization/dashboard-summary requires authentication
Backend: Dashboard summary has candidates_to_scale, losers_to_pause, needs_action, waiting_data, total_active_tests, generated_at
Frontend: AdTestPlanner component (data-testid='ad-test-planner') renders on product detail page
Frontend: AdTestPlanner has 3 tabs: Variations, Test Plan, Results (when test active)
Frontend: 'Start A/B Test' button (data-testid='start-test-btn') creates new ad test
Frontend: Results tab shows variation results tracker with Spend, Clicks, CTR, ATC, Sales columns
Frontend: BudgetOptimizerCard (data-testid='budget-optimizer-card') renders in Results tab when test is active
Frontend: BudgetOptimizerCard shows summary bar with 'Budget Optimizer' title and collecting_data badge
Frontend: BudgetOptimizerCard shows variation recommendations with action badges (Collecting Data for fresh tests)
Frontend: OptimizationDashboardWidget (data-testid='optimization-dashboard-widget') renders on Dashboard when active tests exist
Frontend: OptimizationDashboardWidget shows summary stats grid (Scale/Pause/Kill/Waiting counts)
Frontend: OptimizationDashboardWidget shows 'View All Tests' button (data-testid='view-all-tests-btn')
Frontend: Dashboard loads without errors (data-testid='dashboard')
seed_data_creation: Created 1 active ad test for product 6a5d5ff2-fd4d-4d51-bcd6-d64f0bec8e59 (Worx WG745E lawnmower)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Budget Optimizer V1 fully verified. 3 backend endpoints: POST /api/optimization/recommend/{test_id} (AUTH - returns recommendations), GET /api/optimization/timeline/{test_id} (AUTH - returns event history), GET /api/optimization/dashboard-summary (AUTH - returns summary across active tests). Frontend components: BudgetOptimizerCard in AdTestPlanner Results tab (shows recommendations per variation with confidence bars, action badges, metrics), OptimizationDashboardWidget on Dashboard (shows Scale/Pause/Kill/Waiting counts, View All Tests button). Widget returns null if no active tests. Fresh tests with no results show 'needs_more_data' action. Rule-based engine benchmarks: CTR excellent 2.5%, good 1.8%, poor 1.0%; CPC good £0.50, poor £1.50; ATC good 8%, poor 3%.

backend_endpoints.recommend: POST /api/optimization/recommend/{test_id} (AUTH) - Returns recommendations for each variation with action, confidence, budget, reasoning, metrics
backend_endpoints.dashboard_summary: GET /api/optimization/dashboard-summary (AUTH) - Returns summary of all active tests (to_scale, to_pause, waiting_data counts)

BudgetOptimizerCard.location: AdTestPlanner Results tab (only when test is active)
features: Variation recommendation rows with action badges (Scale Up, Maintain, Pause, Kill, Collecting Data)
Expandable details with metrics (Spend, CTR, CPC, Sales)

OptimizationDashboardWidget.location: Dashboard page (only when active tests exist)
features: Purple gradient header with 'Budget Optimizer' title

recommendation_actions: increase_budget - Scale up winning ads (20-40% increments)
maintain - Keep running, monitor for clearer signals
pause - Consider pausing to reallocate budget
kill - Stop ad to save budget (multiple negative signals)
needs_more_data - Keep running until min_spend/min_clicks thresholds
